bird.name: White-browed jungle flycatcher
bird.summary: The white-browed jungle flycatcher (Vauriella insignis), also known as the Luzon jungle-flycatcher and the Rusty-flanked jungle-flycatcher,…

locations.name: 普洛格山
locations.summary: 普洛格山（菲律賓語：Bundok Pulag，伊洛卡諾語：Bantay Pulag）是菲律賓的山峰，位於該國北部呂宋島，海拔高度2,922米，山上有528種植物和33種鳥類，每年平均降雨量4,489毫米，該山峰大部分地區自1987年2月2…

relations.subject: White-browed jungle flycatcher
relations.evidence: It occurs in a few protected areas like Mount Pulag National Park

relations.subject: White-browed jungle flycatcher
relations.evidence: The natural habitat of the white-browed jungle flycatcher is tropical moist montane forests of the Cordillera Mountain Range and possibly Sierra Madre Mountains
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: White-browed jungle flycatcher
relations.evidence: It is found in tropical moist primary montane Forest above 950 meters above sea level
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: White-browed jungle flycatcher
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: White-browed jungle flycatcher
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss due to deforestation through mining, logging and conversion of habitat into farmland
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
